rawIntent:
[Feature: Build the leave management module â€” Phase 3: Create LeaveRequest domain model and repository]

Create src/modules/leave/leave.model.ts with LeaveRequest interface (id, employeeId, leaveTypeId, startDate, endDate, reason, status: LeaveRequestStatus enum (Draft, Submitted, Approved, Rejected, Cancelled), approverId, approverComment, createdAt, updatedAt) and CreateLeaveRequestDto. Create src/modules/leave/leave.repository.ts with ILeaveRepository interface (create, findById, findByEmployeeId, updateStatus). This phase depends on src/modules/leave-type/leave-type.model.ts from Phase 1 and src/modules/employee/employee.model.ts from Phase 2 â€” read them before generating code that references LeaveType and Employee.

Phase architecture notes:
Core leave request entity with lifecycle states.

leave_requests (\n  id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),\n  employee_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES employees(id),\n  leave_type_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES leave_types(id),\n  start_date DATE NOT NULL,\n  end_date DATE NOT NULL,\n  status VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'draft' CHECK (status IN ('draft', 'submitted', 'approved', 'rejected', 'cancelled')),\n  reason TEXT,\n  approver_id UUID REFERENCES employees(id),\n  approver_comment TEXT,\n  approved_at TIMESTAMPTZ,\n  created_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT now(),\n  updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT now(),\n  CONSTRAINT chk_dates CHECK (end_date >= start_date)\n);\nCREATE INDEX idx_leave_requests_employee_id ON leave_requests(employee_id);\nCREATE INDEX idx_leave_requests_status ON leave_requests(status);\nCREATE INDEX idx_leave_requests_dates ON leave_requests(start_date, end_date);\nCREATE INDEX idx_leave_requests_approver_id ON leave_requests(approver_id);"}
